name: EIGHT
desc: BHI & New Testament · Anunnaki vs Watchers · Full Unrestrained Record · Sources

content.label: DEAD SEA SCROLLS
content.text: Discoveries in the Judaean Desert series (Oxford University Press) — 40 volumes. Israel Antiquities Authority — deadseascrolls.org.il — direct scroll images and transcriptions.

content.label: GE'EZ ORIT
content.text: National Library of Israel — nli.org.il — Beta Israel manuscripts being digitized. R.H. Charles — 1 Enoch (1906). R.H. Charles — The Book of Jubilees (1902).

content.label: TABLE
content.text: STUDY | PUBLICATION | KEY FINDING
Thomas et al. (2000) — American Journal of Human Genetics — Lemba Buba clan CMH at 53% — equaling or exceeding Ashkenazi Levitical populations — highest confirmed frequency in any tested population
Behar et al. (2010) — Nature — Global Jewish population genetics — Beta Israel L haplogroup findings
Carmi et al. (2014) — Nature Communications — Ashkenazi founder population bottleneck — approximately 350 individuals — 600-800 CE — medieval Eastern Europe
Schuenemann et al. (2017) — Nature Communications — Ancient Egyptian DNA — acknowledged limitation: single northern site — Upper Egypt not sampled
Harney et al. (2018) — Nature Communications — Ancient DNA from Chalcolithic Israel — modern Lebanese/Palestinian genetic continuity with Bronze Age Canaanites
Pääbo et al. (2010) — Science — Neanderthal DNA 1-4% in non-African populations — zero in sub-Saharan African populations
Zeberg and Pääbo (2020) — Current Biology — Neanderthal-derived gene variants in modern non-African humans — mood regulation, stress response, pain sensitivity

content.label: TABLE
content.text: SOURCE | DATE | REPOSITORY
Emanuel Bowen — Kingdom of JUDA map — 1747 — British Library — Geographer to King George II — coordinates 6°21'N, 2°05'E on Slave Coast
Herman Moll — Terra Judeorum — 1710 — British Library — Land of the Jews above Niger River interior
Trans-Atlantic Slave Trade Database — Ongoing — slavevoyages.org — 36,000+ documented voyages
Torre do Tombo Archives — Various — Lisbon, Portugal — Portuguese Inquisition trial records
Royal African Company T70 Series — Various — British National Archives — factor journals from Kingdom of Juda
Kuzari Letters / Khazar Correspondence — c. 960 CE — Referenced in Halevi, Yehuda — Kuzari
Al-Idrisi world map — 1154 CE — Bodleian Library, Oxford — south-up orientation
Tarikh al-Sudan — 17th century CE — Al-Sadi — records Hebrew/Israelite presence in West Africa
UN Resolution A/80/L.48 — March 25, 2026 — United Nations General Assembly record
Milik, J.T. — The Books of Enoch: Aramaic Fragments of Qumran Cave 4 (Oxford University Press, 1976) — documents absence of Similitudes from all Qumran manuscripts
Charlesworth, James H. — The Old Testament Pseudepigrapha, Vols 1-2 (Doubleday, 1983-1985)
Charles, R.H. — The Book of Enoch (Oxford: Clarendon Press, 1906)
VanderKam, James C. — The Dead Sea Scrolls Today (Eerdmans, 2010)
Tov, Emanuel — Textual Criticism of the Hebrew Bible (Fortress Press, 3rd ed. 2012)
Tsedaka, Benyamim — The Israelite Samaritan Version of the Torah (Eerdmans, 2013)
Diop, Cheikh Anta — Civilization or Barbarism (Chicago Review Press, 1991)
Diop, Cheikh Anta — The African Origin of Civilization (Chicago Review Press, 1974)
Windsor, Rudolph — From Babylon to Timbuktu (Windsor's Golden Series, 1969)
Koestler, Arthur — The Thirteenth Tribe (Random House, 1976)
Sand, Shlomo — The Invention of the Jewish People (Verso, 2009)
Equiano, Olaudah — The Interesting Narrative of the Life of Olaudah Equiano (1789)
Roman Imperial Coinage (RIC) VII — Spink & Son — SOLI INVICTO COMITI coinage documentation
Eusebius of Caesarea — Vita Constantini — primary source on Council of Nicaea
Josephus, Flavius — The Jewish War and Jewish Antiquities — Loeb Classical Library editions
Cumont, Franz — The Mysteries of Mithra (Open Court Publishing, 1903)
Jim Crow Museum — Ferris State University — alligator bait primary documentation
NAACP Archives — Mary Turner case documentation — 1918
Bolnick et al. (2007) — The Science and Business of Genetic Ancestry Testing — Science Vol. 318

The texts were written by people who knew what was coming.
The suppression happened exactly as they anticipated.
The texts survived exactly as they intended.
